title: Teladoc Health Inc. (TDOC) Q1 2024 Earnings: Misses on EPS, Surpasses Revenue Expectations
text: Teladoc Health Q1 2024 Earnings Summary. Financial Results - Revenue Performance: Teladoc surpassed expectations with revenue of $646.1 million, representing 3% year-over-year growth and exceeding the estimated $637.29 million. Revenue growth was driven by a 1% increase in access fees and a significant 14% growth in other revenue. Profitability Metrics: The company fell short on earnings, reporting a net loss of $81.9 million ($0.49 per share), worse than the anticipated loss of $78.04 million ($0.46 per share). The net loss expanded 18% compared to Q1 2023, primarily due to increased stock-based compensation and amortization expenses. Operational Efficiency: Adjusted EBITDA improved substantially, climbing 20% to $63.1 million from $52.8 million. Free cash flow showed modest improvement with the cash outflow narrowing to $26.6 million from $32.5 million year-over-year. Geographic Breakdown: International operations grew robustly at 13% to $98.5 million, while U.S. revenue increased only 1%. The Integrated Care segment posted 8% growth, whereas BetterHelp declined 4%. Forward Guidance: Management projects Q2 2024 revenue between $635-660 million and adjusted EBITDA of $70-80 million. Full-year expectations range from $2,635-2,735 million in revenue.
